description: Threshold calibration pairs only. MATCH_THRESHOLD (lib/check/candidates.ts) must be chosen so every expectMatch:true case scores >= threshold and every expectMatch:false case scores < threshold. Never used to compute reported precision/recall metrics — see holdout.json for that.
